horoscope: Recent weeks have been busier or more scattered than usual for you, dear Aries. Today, the Sun enters your family and home sector, stirring a stronger need to focus, rest, restore your energy, and focus on activities that revolve around home, family, and heart. This month-long cycle, lasting until July 22nd, is good for reconnecting with the need for inner peace and comfort, enjoying quieter and perhaps emotionally safer activities, and collecting your thoughts and centering yourself. Worldly ambitions tend to take a backseat now as you focus on your personal life and support systems--an important mission! Building inner strength and nurturing the self, as well as loved ones, are in the spotlight in the weeks ahead. Today's transits support rewarding, even nurturing, conversations. It's a good time to express your affection.

The Sun begins its visit to your solar third house today, dear Taurus, and in many ways, the coming four weeks are about learning, connecting, and communicating. It's an excellent time to branch out, learn new things, satisfy your curiosity, and find more effective ways to reach out to others. Your daily life can be especially busy now, mostly pleasantly so. It's a strong time to diversify, learn about the people around you, and pick up new information or skills. You can be doing quite a bit of multitasking, and it's a strong time to introduce more variety into your life, though not the most ideal time of year for focus. This cycle is more about discovery and branching out than about specializing, but it's a key one for gathering intel, exploring new interests, or developing skills. Today, however, you thoroughly enjoy settling in and pouring more attention into the basics. Comfortable, earthy activities are a strong draw.

The Sun moves out of your sign today, dear Gemini, and begins its month-long transit of your sector of values, finances, comfort matters, personal possessions, and self-worth. You take more pride in your personal resources and ability to build and manage your life in the weeks ahead. It's a good cycle for discovering what you truly value. As well, you can get in touch with how you feel about your own worth and talents, and how this affects your life in general and your earning power. You would be wise to focus more on what you have than what you want during this period that lasts until July 22nd. Life is about settling in and making yourself both comfortable and secure at this time. It's a fine time for taking charge of your finances and valuables, but it's also an excellent period for recognizing your own value! Today is strong for bringing more harmony to your world, especially through your words and gestures. It comes more naturally to promote a happy, positive, and growth-oriented atmosphere around you.

The Sun heads into your sign today, dear Cancer, where it will visit until July 22nd. During this cycle, you tend to take more mindful action and feel that you're in the driver's seat. Remind yourself that you have more power than usual to make resolutions and changes that genuinely improve your life. As more attention comes to you, you quite naturally want to get your act together. The month ahead is a personally powerful time to let your personality shine. There is a stronger desire to start fresh, and the opportunities to do so are likely to emerge. It can be a time of increased vitality and a much-needed focus on your personal needs and goals. Today, you're drawn to healing and replenishing activities. Take notes if you come up with an idea related to money or comfort.

A month-long cycle begins today as the Sun enters your solar twelfth house, dear Leo. Now and in the coming month, you may feel a greater need for a break from competitive energies or demanding situations. You are drawn to restful, relaxing, and healing activities. While you are coming across as approachable these days with Venus in your sign, part of you requires periods devoted to reflection on, or processing of, the activities of the last year. During this new Sun cycle that extends to July 22nd, it's very appropriate to tie up loose ends and to consider ways to cleanse, heal, and repair your mind and emotions. Recognize the power of some solitude or more quiet time for the best results now. There can be a tidy-up, of sorts, on an emotional, spiritual, or mental level. Today, friends or associates can be a source of opportunity to expand your knowledge and experience. Someone may be taking a real shine to you now. You can enjoy a more vital feeling through the special care you give to a project, idea, or person in your life.

The Sun heads into your sector of friendships, dreams, and wishes today, dear Virgo, and the month ahead brings more sociable, experimental, and hopeful energy into your life. You take more pride than usual in your friendships, connections, community involvement, or aspirations, and associates or friends may look to you for direction. Sharing with others gives you a boost, and you get more satisfaction than usual when your actions positively impact others. You are a little less focused on career goals. It's a time to plant "seeds" of ideas, dreams, and hopes. Benefits come from recognizing your need for others. Your social conscience or sense of responsibility increases in the weeks ahead. There is a nurturing and accepting theme to today that is a welcome break from the usual. The day holds promise for giving special attention and care to your work, duties, or a business matter.

The Sun enters your reputation and career sector today, dear Libra, and will visit this area of your solar chart until July 22nd. You are more goal-oriented at this time of year and especially invested in your performance, responsibilities, accomplishments, and image. This might be about taking greater pride in fulfilling your duties. Your motivation to succeed can deepen at this time. Others notice your work or your accomplishments, which can encourage you to connect with your responsible, competent side. You could find yourself in higher demand than usual, and you become more aware of the impact you're making. This transit brings new energy to your career or public life. Feeling comfortable, at ease, and content can attract good things to you today. While things can be quiet much of the day, the Moon enters your sign later today, and you're more interactive and engaged.

The Sun begins its transit of your sector of spirit, adventure, and the higher mind, dear Scorpio. Until July 22nd, the desire to break the usual routine to engage your mind and spirit is strong. It's a cycle for seeking wonderful ways to feel and be free, and it's an empowering time if you are open to acting upon your need for adventure. Plans can be big or small, but the important thing is that you are expanding your mind and experiences. Seeing the big picture helps free you from taking petty annoyances too seriously. There can be a stronger focus on studies, a special interest or course, publishing, and sharing ideas. Today, good energy is with you as you free yourself from burdens. Look for ways to improve your daily life, your work, and your reputation.

The Sun begins its month-long transit of your solar eighth house today, dear Sagittarius. This influence puts the spotlight on your ability to share and blend with a partner or better understand yourself as you face the need to improve, change, and transform. You could have an "all or nothing" attitude to activities and relationships during this cycle. You might find yourself attracted to challenges that take you a little out of your comfort zone. It's a time to enjoy, accept, and embrace your deeper feelings and desires. During this cycle, which lasts until July 22nd, you're more interested in digging deep than in skimming the surface. You take more notice of the hidden elements in the circumstances and the people around you. Today's energies are strong for feeling others' support, and you're ready and willing to give someone special attention and nurturing.

The day brings a new solar cycle that puts the spotlight on your one-to-one relationships, dear Capricorn, whether personal or business or both. This month-long cycle stirs your need for others, enhances your approachability, and helps bring back a healthy sense of balance in your life. While it's not the ideal period for personal plans, on a social level, your increased ability to compromise and negotiate brings rewards. You stand to learn a lot through your relationships now and in the coming weeks. As you look at things from two sides, you become more aware of imbalances, and you're eager to make changes to restore order to your life. Today, someone is putting their faith in you, and this, in turn, motivates you to step up your game.

The Sun begins its transit of your solar sixth house today, dear Aquarius, and will visit this area of your chart until July 22nd. Health and wellness goals, as well as work and daily routines, can come into stronger focus during this cycle, although Mercury and Jupiter have already stirred the pot in these areas for you in recent weeks. Schedules, routines, and organization in your life take on greater importance, making this a great time to take care of the details that help get your life into smooth working order. Pride in these systems, your work, or your self-care programs is pronounced during this cycle. It's an excellent month for lifestyle changes. Today, bonding with others or enjoying a mood boost can be a pleasant theme. Creatively speaking, you're feeling quite good, and expressing your affection through special attention can be satisfying.

The Sun moves into your solar fifth house today, dear Pisces, beginning a month-long cycle that spotlights creative self-expression, pleasure, entertainment, and romance. The weeks ahead are strong for enjoying creative pursuits and finding new avenues for self-expression. Pastimes, hobbies, romance, and recreation are in stronger focus. A more spontaneous, playful, and affectionate approach to your life comes more naturally now and in the weeks ahead. You might begin or renew special projects. It's a time to celebrate and express your talents, abilities, and love. You're more inclined to show others what you can do and to enjoy life's pleasures. It can also be a romantic time of year. Today, gentleness, compassion, and warmth seem to be the routes to happiness. Coming to peace on a matter can be a theme.
